'''Sunburst Mining''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company owned by [[Gerell Yok'Ril]]<ref name="Two Heads Aren't Better Than One">{{Wizards|url=rpga/livingforce/article.asp?x=lf/swlf20010906a_dua&c=swlfc|text=Two Heads Aren't Better Than One}}</ref> which operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. Sunburst Mining attempted to mine [[Cloud Mountain]], but the [[Cloud Mountain mines|mines]] were ultimately abandoned. Sunburst did not completely give up their claim, however, leaving a few [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] in the mine to maintain their legal holding.<ref name="TRW">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}</ref>

The logo of Sunburst Mining consisted of half of a [[Star/Legends|sun]] rising over a horizon line with a pair of slitted eyes peering out of the face of the sun. A flaming "[[High Galactic/Legends|S]]" was placed below the image. This logo was modified and used as the symbol of the [[Cularin resistance]], who were using the abandoned mine as a base of operations.<ref name="TRW" />
